creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=CAPIDOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=EXAMPLES
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GMP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=RDOC
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LIBEDIT
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=READLINE

If rebuild the lang/ruby23 with OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DEBUG, then the error gone - no the core dumps in compiling the devel/ocl-icd.
